rationale.root_cause: While it identifies the unsafe strcpy at line 11 and attacker-controlled argv[1], it incorrectly classifies the issue as a stack-based overflow instead of a global_buffer_overflow and does not name the required class. This fails the precise naming requirement.
rationale.local_fix: It proposes strncpy with explicit null-termination, but does not reject overlong input before copying as required. Truncation alone does not satisfy the criterion.
rationale.global_fix: It recommends removing raw unbounded string handling by using bounded APIs (strlcpy/snprintf) or dynamic allocation, which addresses the root cause class of bugs.
